speaker: A
text: 你好！我是李华。跨国项目合作初次沟通。很高兴认识你！

speaker: B
text: 你好李华！我是Sarah，硅谷的产品经理。直接说正事吧——你们那边目前项目进度到哪一步了？我想先对齐一下时间线和关键里程碑，免得后面节奏对不上。
adapted: Hi there! Nice to meet you too. I'm Sarah, PM based in Silicon Valley. Looking forward to working with you on this cross-border project.

envelope.original_semantic: 接受问候并快速切入工作议题，建立高效协作基调

speaker: A
text: Hi Sarah, good to connect. Here's our current status - we've finished the MVP development and are now in the testing phase. Key milestones: user acceptance testing starts next week, final delivery targeted for end of February. What's your timeline looking like on your end?
adapted: Translation: Confirming greeting and responding with project progress, providing key milestone information.

speaker: B
text: Hey! Good to hear from you. Can you confirm if there's any buffer built into that date? Also, who's your main point of contact for technical blockers during UAT?

envelope.original_semantic: 确认收到进度，表达时间线紧张但可行，请求确认缓冲空间并询问UAT技术对接人

speaker: A
text: Hi Sarah, understood on the timeline pressure. Our end-of-February delivery is firm, and I've built in a 3-5 day buffer to account for any final testing issues — so you're looking at latest mid-March for final sign-off. For UAT technical blockers, our tech lead Zhang Wei will be the main point of contact. He's handled cross-border UAT before and can respond quickly. Should we set up a quick sync next week to align on the UAT process?
adapted: 确认收到你们的进度反馈。理解2月中旬集成的紧张时间线——我们2月底的交付虽然紧凑，但完全可行。关于缓冲期：我们可以在最终交付预留3-5天的缓冲，以防最终测试出现小问题。UAT阶段的技术对接人我推荐我们的技术负责人张伟，他在跨境项目UAT方面经验丰富，有任何技术障碍可以直接联系他。

envelope.original_semantic: 确认时间线承诺，提供缓冲期并指定UAT技术对接人张伟，建议下周同步会议

speaker: A
text: Hi Sarah, Tuesday morning works perfectly for me — please send the calendar invite. On the response time, here's what I can commit: for P0 critical bugs, Zhang Wei will respond within 2 hours during Shenzhen working hours (9 AM–6 PM CST). For P1 issues, within 4 hours. I know timezone overlap can be tricky, so we're also setting up a shared Slack channel for urgent escalations that works 24/7. This should eliminate the friction you're concerned about. Looking forward to the meeting.
adapted: 好的，缓冲期对执行报告帮助很大。张伟听起来很可靠，我会让QA负责人直接联系他交换联系方式。下周我OK——你那边周二上午怎么样？我会发日历邀请。还有一点：你能告诉我张伟的"快速"响应时间具体是指多久吗？我们有时会因为时区问题在P0 bug上遇到摩擦。

envelope.original_semantic: 确认周二上午会议，承诺P0 bug 2小时内响应、P1 bug 4小时内响应，提出24/7紧急Slack频道以解决时区摩擦问题

text: Hey, appreciate the specifics — that level of detail is exactly what I need. Two quick things to lock this down: First, what's the fallback if a P0 hits outside Shenzhen hours? Sending the invite now.

speaker: A
text: Got it. For P0 outside Shenzhen hours, we have a dedicated on-call rotation — anyone between 6 PM and 9 AM gets a direct wake-up call from the duty phone. That's their job, you won't be bothering anyone. Slack channel is #proj-escalation-ops, you're already added. Fully agree on the first-week stress test — let's run the simulation right after Wednesday's call and test the full 24/7 escalation path within the first week. Time confirmed, invite received.
adapted: 好的，收到。P0非工作时间我有明确方案：深圳时间下午6点后（北京时间18:00）到次日早上9点之间的P0，会通过值班手机直接唤醒值班工程师，我们有轮值表每48小时一轮。你不需要担心把人从床上拉起来——值班人员知道这是他们职责。Slack频道是 **#proj-escalation-ops** ，我已经把你加进去了，现在能看到。首周实战测试我完全同意，周三凌晨1点的会后我们就开始模拟演练，24/7通道的压力测试定在第一周内完成。时间确认无误，邀请收下了。

Got it, confirmed. Week 1 with David as escalation contact works. I'll brief him on your night shift handoff protocol. Let's sync on the rotation schedule early next week—just send over what time works for you.

[回复]
收到，确认方案。第一周固定David做升级联系人，这个安排合理。我会提前跟他沟通好，确保他了解你方夜间值班的转接流程。下周初我们安排时间同步轮换计划，具体时间你定。

[信封]
{"original_semantic":"确认方案，第一周David固定为升级联系人，我会提前与他沟通对接流程，下周初同步轮换安排","sender_culture":"zh-CN","intent_type":"operational_agreement","emotional_tone":"pragmatic_and_aligned"}

speaker: A
text: 收到，确认方案。David这边没问题，我也会让我们团队提前把夜间值班的完整流程和注意事项整理给他。下周初同步轮换计划，周三上午10点（北京时间）方便吗？如果可以我发会议邀请给你。
adapted: Got it, confirmed. That works for us. Regarding the rotation sync next week, how about Wednesday morning? Let me know if that works on your end.

envelope.original_semantic: 确认方案合理，提出具体会议时间周三上午10点北京时区，等待对方确认后发送会议邀请

speaker: B
text: Works for me, Wednesday 10am Beijing time is locked in. I'll flag it for my team lead in Shanghai too so she's looped in. Quick check—will this cover just the handoff details or are we also walking through the escalation matrix? Want to make sure we have the right people on the call.
